name: Russia
summary: Condemned strikes with China. Providing intelligence to Iran (US military positions data). Convened emergency UNSC sessions. Stopped short of direct military involvement. Benefits from high oil prices as energy exporter.

signals.content: Russia and China raised diplomatic voices against US-Israeli attacks. Coordinated emergency UNSC sessions. Condemned as sovereignty violations.
Russia providing intelligence to Iran including data on US military positions. Logistical support. But no direct military intervention.

edges.context: Providing US military position data. Diplomatic backing at UNSC. But no troops or weapons. Strategic caution.
Joint UNSC actions. Both condemning strikes. Both providing limited support but no military involvement.
Russia benefits from high oil prices as major energy exporter. War increasing Russian oil revenues despite sanctions.
